title: cachrys pabularia
intro: Cachrys pabularia, also known as the pabularia or wild celery, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, making it a treatment for various ailments such as digestive issues, fever, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Cachrys pabularia include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce stress and anxiety, and aid in the treatment of respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Cachrys pabularia is often used as a dried herb, infusion, or tincture, and can be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
